import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  Sparkles,
  FileText,
  ListChecks,
  Upload,
  Brain,
  Database,
  CheckCircle,
  AlertTriangle,
  Trash2,
  Play
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import VoiceInput from "/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx";
import AustralianAIDisclaimer from "/src/app/components/AustralianAIDisclaimer.tsx";
const mockTrainingDocs = [
  {
    id: "1",
    name: "ISO 27001 Standards.pdf",
    type: "PDF",
    size: "2.4 MB",
    uploadedDate: "2026-03-20",
    status: "processed"
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    name: "GDPR Guidelines.docx",
    type: "DOCX",
    size: "1.8 MB",
    uploadedDate: "2026-03-18",
    status: "processed"
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    name: "Healthcare Compliance Manual.pdf",
    type: "PDF",
    size: "5.2 MB",
    uploadedDate: "2026-04-01",
    status: "processing"
  }
];
export default function AICommandCenter({ role }) {
  _s();
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("generate");
  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [checking, setChecking] = useState(false);
  const [training, setTraining] = useState(false);
  const [generateType, setGenerateType] = useState("policy");
  const [generatePrompt, setGeneratePrompt] = useState("");
  const [generatedContent, setGeneratedContent] = useState("");
  const [category, setCategory] = useState("safety");
  const [uploadedFile, setUploadedFile] = useState("");
  const [complianceResult, setComplianceResult] = useState({ status: null, issues: [], suggestions: [] });
  const canUseAI = role === "org-admin" || role === "compliance-manager";
  const handleGenerate = () => {
    if (!generatePrompt.trim()) {
      alert("⚠️ Please enter a prompt");
      return;
    }
    setGenerating(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const mockContent = `# ${generateType === "policy" ? "Policy" : "Procedure"}: ${generatePrompt}

## Purpose
This ${generateType} establishes guidelines for ${generatePrompt.toLowerCase()}.

## Scope
This applies to all employees and contractors.

## ${generateType === "policy" ? "Policy Statement" : "Procedure Steps"}
${generateType === "policy" ? "1. All personnel must comply with these requirements\n2. Regular reviews will be conducted\n3. Violations will result in disciplinary action" : "**Step 1: Initial Assessment**\n- Review requirements\n- Identify stakeholders\n\n**Step 2: Implementation**\n- Follow established protocols\n- Document all actions\n\n**Step 3: Review**\n- Verify completion\n- Submit for approval"}

## Related Items
- Workplace Safety Policy
- Emergency Response Procedure
- Compliance Framework

⚠️ **AI-Generated Disclaimer:** This content was generated by AI and must be reviewed and approved before publishing.`;
      setGeneratedContent(mockContent);
      setGenerating(false);
    }, 2e3);
  };
  const handleComplianceCheck = () => {
    if (!uploadedFile) {
      alert("⚠️ Please upload a document first");
      return;
    }
    setChecking(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const results = [
        {
          status: "compliant",
          issues: [],
          suggestions: ["Document meets all compliance requirements", "No action needed"]
        },
        {
          status: "warning",
          issues: ["Missing version number", "Review date not specified"],
          suggestions: ["Add version control section", "Include next review date"]
        },
        {
          status: "violation",
          issues: ["Non-compliant terminology used", "Missing required legal disclaimer"],
          suggestions: [
            'Replace "employees" with "personnel"',
            "Add legal disclaimer as per GDPR Article 13",
            "Include data protection officer contact"
          ]
        }
      ];
      setComplianceResult(results[Math.floor(Math.random() * results.length)]);
      setChecking(false);
    }, 2e3);
  };
  const handleTrainAI = () => {
    setTraining(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      alert("✅ AI model training initiated! This may take 10-15 minutes.");
      setTraining(false);
    }, 1500);
  };
  if (!canUseAI) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dowf0", _fgB: 1779104383090, className: "flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]", "data-fg-dowf0": "418.284:653.57:/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx:147:7:4806:531:e:div:e", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dowf1", _fgB: 1779104383090, className: "text-center", "data-fg-dowf1": "418.284:653.57:/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx:148:9:4878:446:e:div:etete", children: [

_s(AICommandCenter, "FRlFqOco8deteqNfr2iczX7UcHY=");

var _c;

  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/shared/AICommandCenter.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
